title: Software Developer
description:
**About The Company**
 Eutopia Solutions is a leading provider of innovative trading technology solutions with a strong presence in the energy trading and risk management sector. Over the past 30 years, the company has established itself as a trusted partner for global trading organizations, delivering cutting\\-edge platforms and services that optimize trading operations, enhance decision\\-making, and drive business growth. Eutopia Solutions prides itself on its commitment to technological excellence, customer\\-centric approach, and fostering a collaborative environment that encourages continuous learning and innovation. With a focus on delivering high\\-impact solutions, the company continues to expand its global footprint and set industry standards in trading systems.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Eutopia Solutions is seeking a talented Software Developer specializing in JavaScript, integration, and scripting to join our dynamic team in Pune, Maharashtra. This role offers an exciting opportunity to work on systems that underpin real\\-world energy trading and risk management decisions. You will be responsible for developing and maintaining scripts, APIs, and system integrations within our trading ETRM/CTRM platform, ensuring seamless connectivity across critical trading, reporting, and operational workflows. The ideal candidate will have a passion for problem\\-solving, a keen interest in trading technology, and a desire to contribute to a global success story. Training will be provided for specific platforms such as ION Aspect CTRM / AspectScript, making this an excellent stepping stone for those looking to advance their careers in fintech and energy trading systems.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The successful candidate will possess a strong foundation in JavaScript, particularly ES6\\+ features, and have experience working with dynamic HTML code generation, JSON/XML parsing, and transformation. Knowledge of SOAP and RESTful APIs is essential, alongside solid debugging skills to troubleshoot and resolve issues efficiently. Prior experience with integration or enterprise systems will be highly advantageous. Candidates should have a proactive mindset, excellent communication skills, and the ability to collaborate effectively with stakeholders across different regions, including London and other global offices. A background in trading technology or financial systems is preferred but not mandatory, provided the candidate demonstrates a strong technical aptitude and eagerness to learn.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Develop JavaScript\\-based scripts and solutions utilizing entity models, workbenches, and uploaders to automate and streamline trading workflows.
* Create and maintain SOAP and REST API integrations to connect various trading, reporting, and operational systems.
* Design and implement reports, workflows, and automation processes to enhance system efficiency and accuracy.
* Collaborate closely with business and technical stakeholders to understand requirements and deliver tailored solutions.
* Participate in code reviews, testing, and documentation to ensure high\\-quality deliverables.
* Stay updated with the latest industry trends and incorporate best practices into development processes.


**Benefits**
 Eutopia Solutions offers a competitive base salary complemented by a comprehensive benefits package, including health insurance, paid time off, and opportunities for professional development. Employees gain exposure to niche, high\\-demand trading technology, working on business\\-critical projects that have a tangible impact on trading operations. The company fosters a collaborative and inclusive environment, encouraging continuous learning and growth. This role provides a unique platform to develop expertise in energy trading systems and fintech, opening doors to future career advancement within the organization and the broader industry.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Eutopia Solutions is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to creating an inclusive environment where all employees and applicants are treated with respect and fairness. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other characteristic protected by law. We believe that diversity and inclusion drive innovation and are essential to our continued success.

title: QA Engineer (India)
description:
The QA Engineer will be responsible for ensuring the quality of our software products through meticulous manual testing. You will work closely with developers, product managers, and other stakeholders to identify defects, verify functionality, and ensure an exceptional user experience. This role focuses on hands\\-on testing, test case creation, and detailed reporting to maintain high standards of software quality.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Test Planning and Design: Create detailed, comprehensive, and well\\-structured test plans and test cases based on product requirements and specifications.
* Manual Testing: Execute manual test cases to verify the functionality, usability, and performance of software applications across various platforms and devices.
* Defect Identification and Reporting: Identify, document, and track defects using bug\\-tracking tools (e.g., Jira, Linear), providing clear and detailed reproduction steps.
* Collaboration: Work closely with developers and product managers to understand requirements, provide feedback, and ensure defects are resolved effectively.
* Regression Testing: Perform regression testing to ensure new changes do not negatively impact existing functionality.
* User Acceptance Testing: Support user acceptance testing (UAT) by preparing test scenarios and assisting end\\-users during testing phases.
* Documentation: Maintain accurate and up\\-to\\-date test documentation, including test cases, test results, and defect reports.
* Quality Advocacy: Advocate for quality throughout the software development lifecycle, ensuring adherence to best practices and standards.


**Qualifications**
* Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field (or equivalent experience).
* Technical Skills:
+ Strong understanding of software testing methodologies, including functional, regression, and exploratory testing.
+ Familiarity with bug\\-tracking tools (e.g., Jira, Bugzilla)
+ Basic knowledge of software development processes

* Soft Skills:
+ Excellent attention to detail and problem\\-solving skills.
+ Strong communication skills to articulate defects and collaborate with cross\\-functional teams.
+ Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities in a fast\\-paced environment.

* Preferred Skills:
+ Experience testing web and/or mobile applications.
+ Familiarity with basic scripting or automation tools (e.g., Selenium, Postman) is a plus but not required.
+ Knowledge of SQL for database testing is an advantage.

title: Software Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Pocket FM, founded in 2018, stands as India's premier audio storytelling platform, revolutionizing the way millions experience stories across diverse genres. With a vast library that includes Romance, Drama, Thriller, Fantasy, Sci\\-Fi, and Mythology, available in eight languages, Pocket FM has established a significant global footprint. The platform boasts over 200 million active listeners worldwide, with users dedicating an average of 120 minutes daily to engaging with content. This remarkable growth underscores its position as one of the fastest\\-expanding audio platforms, with a strong presence across the US, Europe, LATAM, and Southeast Asia.
   

  

 Our innovative business model combines free access with micropayments for premium content, fueling robust revenue growth. In FY25, we achieved an annual recurring revenue (ARR) of INR 2,000 crore and hosted over 100,000 hours of content. At the forefront of technological innovation, we leverage AI\\-generated content to enhance scalability and user engagement, making us a leader in the evolving audio storytelling landscape.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Software Engineer to join our Generative AI team. This role offers a unique opportunity to contribute to the development of innovative AI\\-driven solutions that enhance our platform's capabilities. As a key member of the team, you will work closely with AI engineers, data scientists, and product managers to experiment, prototype, and optimize advanced AI models, including Large Language Models (LLMs) and other generative AI technologies.
   

  

 Your responsibilities will include designing and implementing scalable backend systems that support AI features, ensuring high performance and reliability. You will play a pivotal role in building and maintaining microservices, integrating cloud services, and developing retrieval systems using vector databases. This position provides a platform to work on cutting\\-edge AI applications that directly impact user experience and content delivery at scale.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related fields.
* 3\\-6 years of experience in backend development, with a strong track record of delivering scalable software solutions.
* Proficiency in Python or Go (Golang), with experience in backend frameworks such as FastAPI, Flask, Gin, or Echo.
* Hands\\-on experience with RESTful APIs, gRPC, GraphQL, and microservice architecture.
* Knowledge of vector databases like Pinecone, FAISS, or Weaviate, and retrieval systems.
* Familiarity with Large Language Model (LLM) APIs from providers such as OpenAI or Anthropic, and AI integration workflows.
* Strong understanding of databases including Postgres, MongoDB, and Redis, along with caching strategies.
* Experience with distributed systems, cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, Azure), and containerization tools like Docker and Kubernetes.
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines and version control systems.


**Responsibilities**
* Architect, develop, and maintain backend services, APIs, and microservices to support AI\\-driven features.
* Design and optimize Retrieval\\-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines and retrieval layers using vector databases.
* Implement scalable, distributed systems capable of handling high throughput AI workloads.
* Ensure the security, fault tolerance, and observability of backend services through best practices.
* Integrate cloud services, caching mechanisms, and storage solutions to optimize system performance.
* Collaborate with AI teams to integrate model APIs, orchestrate inference workflows, and ensure seamless deployment.
* Write maintainable, well\\-tested code following engineering best practices, including CI/CD, code reviews, and documentation.
* Stay updated with emerging AI and backend development trends, applying innovative solutions to enhance platform capabilities.


**Benefits**
 At Pocket FM, we believe in fostering a supportive and dynamic work environment. Our employees enjoy competitive compensation packages, comprehensive health insurance, and flexible work arrangements. We offer opportunities for professional growth through continuous learning programs, workshops, and conferences. Our collaborative culture encourages innovation and creativity, empowering team members to bring new ideas to life. Additionally, employees benefit from a vibrant work environment located in Bengaluru, with access to modern amenities and a focus on work\\-life balance.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Pocket FM is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other characteristic protected by law. We believe that diverse teams foster innovation and drive the success of our platform and company as a whole.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
At Anaplan, we are a team of innovators focused on optimizing business decision\\-making through our leading AI\\-infused scenario planning and analysis platform so our customers can outpace their competition and the market.
   

  

 What unites Anaplanners across teams and geographies is our collective commitment to our customers’ success and to our Winning Culture.
   

  

 Our customers rank among the who’s who in the Fortune 50\\. Coca\\-Cola, LinkedIn, Adobe, LVMH and Bayer are just a few of the 2,400\\+ global companies who rely on our best\\-in\\-class platform.
   

  

 Our Winning Culture is the engine that drives our teams of innovators. We champion diversity of thought and ideas, we behave like leaders regardless of title, we are committed to achieving ambitious goals, and we love celebrating our wins – big and small.
   

  

 Supported by operating principles of being strategy\\-led, values\\-based and disciplined in execution, you’ll be inspired, connected, developed and rewarded here. Everything that makes you unique is welcome; join us and let’s build what’s next \\- together!
   

  

**The Role**
 The Core Performance engineering team is looking for a senior/mid\\-level/junior software engineer to build and maintain performance tests and performance test frameworks that underpin our performance work at Anaplan, as well as advocate for strong software engineering principles for performant software. Performance is at the heart of everything we do at Anaplan, so we need someone who loves performance as well as advocating for the performance of the platform.
   

  

**Who are you?**
* A Strong Engineer: You've worked on large codebases before, and know SOLID principles of software engineering
* Accountable and self\\-directed: You hold yourself to a high standard, work independently, and take responsibility for outcomes.

title: Senior LLM/RAG Engineer (Legacy Modernization)
description:
The
 **LLM/RAG Engineer** 
 will play a pivotal role in a high\\-profile modernization project, transitioning a legacy RPG/IBM i\\-based Dealer Management System (DMS) into a modern, cloud\\-native Java architecture.
   

  

 In this Proof of Concept (POC) phase, you will specialize in
 **CodeRAG** 
 (Retrieval\\-Augmented Generation for code) and
 **Abstract Syntax Tree (AST)** 
 techniques. Your primary objective is to automate the parsing, transformation, and migration of legacy business logic into modern microservices. You will work at the intersection of Generative AI and legacy system modernization, ensuring that automated code generation remains accurate, performant, and aligned with architectural specifications.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Code Transformation \\& Analysis: Utilize AST techniques to parse legacy RPG code and transform it into structured formats suitable for automated migration.
* RAG Implementation: Design and maintain RAG pipelines using AWS Bedrock and Vector Databases to provide LLMs with high\\-fidelity context from legacy documentation and code analysis.
* Data Preprocessing: Clean, structure, and enrich metadata from legacy systems, potentially involving the creation of knowledge graphs or embeddings to improve LLM accuracy.
* Iterative Validation: Perform rigorous validation and correction of AI\\-generated code assets to ensure they meet modern Java standards and functional parity with the legacy system.
* Legacy Integration: Collaborate with specialized code analysis tools (such as PKS eXplain) to extract business logic and code flows from IBM i environments.
* Collaboration \\& Documentation: Work closely with cross\\-functional teams in India and Germany, documenting complex business logic and ensuring tight feedback loops during the POC.
* Quality Assurance: Adhere to strict architectural specifications and collaborate on testing strategies to validate the migrated solution.


**Requirements**
* Total Work Experience: Minimum of 4–8 years of experience in software engineering, with a significant focus on AI/ML or Backend development.
* AI \\& LLM Expertise: Proven experience working with advanced LLMs (e.g., Claude 3\\.5/3\\.7/4\\) and building RAG pipelines.
* Technical Proficiency: \\* Languages: Strong proficiency in Python.
+ Cloud: Hands\\-on experience with AWS Bedrock.
+ Databases: Experience with Vector Databases such as Milvus or Pinecone.

* Code Transformation Skills: Deep understanding of Abstract Syntax Trees (AST) and experience in parsing or transforming code programmatically.
* Modernization Knowledge: Familiarity with code migration processes, microservices architecture, and cloud\\-native design patterns.
* Tools \\& Version Control: Expert\\-level knowledge of Git for managing generated code and collaborative development.
* Soft Skills: A proactive nature with strong communication skills, essential for navigating the ambiguity of a POC environment and working with distributed global teams.


**We offer**
* Opportunity to work on bleeding\\-edge projects
* Work with a highly motivated and dedicated team
* Competitive salary
* Flexible schedule
* Benefits package \\- medical insurance, sports
* Corporate social events
* Professional development opportunities
* Well\\-equipped office

title: IT QA Test engineer (eCommerce apps)
description:
**Job Title: IT QA Test engineer (eCommerce apps)**
**Position Overview**
 We are looking for a skilled IT QA Test engineer with hands\\-on experience in testing web applications, preferably within eCommerce environments. The ideal candidate should possess strong analytical abilities, solid testing fundamentals, and experience executing functional, integration, and UAT test cycles. Experience with SAP Commerce Cloud is preferred but not mandatory.
   

  

 This role requires close collaboration with developers, product owners, and business teams to ensure timely and high‑quality delivery.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* End\\-to\\-End Testing: Execute and lead E2E testing of complex web applications, ensuring functional, integration, and regression coverage across SAP Commerce Cloud and related systems.
* SAP Commerce Cloud Testing (Preferred): Apply hands\\-on experience testing SAP Commerce Cloud features, OCC APIs, Backoffice flows, data integrations, and storefront functionalities.


**3** 
**. Requirements \\& Acceptance Criteria Validation:** 
 Analyze business requirements and acceptance criteria to derive comprehensive and accurate test scenarios and expected results.
   

  

* Integration Testing: Lead integration testing activities involving SAP ECC, SAP C4C, and other SAP/non\\-SAP systems, validating data flows and cross\\-application processes.
* UAT Management: Plan, prepare, and drive UAT cycles, coordinating with business users, developers, project managers, and other stakeholders.
* Agile Collaboration: Work closely with development, architecture, and product teams in an agile environment to ensure quality throughout the sprint lifecycle.
* Defect Management: Prioritize defects, drive triage discussions, track resolution, and ensure closure using tools such as ServiceNow, JIRA, or similar.
* Test Tools \\& Management: Utilize test case management tools such as ServiceNow, TestRail etc. to author, execute, and maintain test cases and test reports.
* Responsive Testing: Perform multi\\-device/browser responsive testing using tools such as BrowserStack.
* Documentation \\& Reporting: Maintain clear test documentation, execution reports, defect logs, and communicate risks proactively.
* Production Release Support: Provide standby and validation support during production deployment windows.


**Qualifications**
 4–6 years of QA/testing experience in web applications. Experience testing integrated systems (SAP or non\\-SAP). Exposure to SAP Commerce Cloud is desirable. Experience with agile methodologies. Hands\\-on experience with JIRA, Confluence, and test management tools.
   

  

**Additional Skills**
 Strong analytical and problem\\-solving skills. Good communication and teamwork abilities. Attention to detail with strong documentation discipline. Ability to work in a fast\\-paced, collaborative environment.
   

  

**Preferred Skills**
 Knowledge of SAP Commerce Cloud functional flows. Exposure to SAP C4C or SAP ECC integration testing. Understanding of eCommerce business processes. Basic familiarity with HTML/CSS/JS is an advantage.
   

  

 If you are a detail‑oriented tester with a strong foundation in web application testing and a desire to grow within an innovative eCommerce landscape, we encourage you to apply. Join our team to contribute your skills in delivering high‑quality solutions, supporting integrated SAP and non‑SAP systems, and collaborating within an agile and fast‑paced environment committed to continuous improvement and customer success.
